zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy於1387年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Sir James Wallace of Eldeslie32歲，母親Ellen Wallace of Elderslie27歲。他與Elizabeth de Cathcart在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安格雷布利其結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1447年在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾吉爾馬可爾姆享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy于1387年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲Sir James Wallace of Eldeslie32岁，母亲Ellen Wallace of Elderslie27岁。他与Elizabeth de Cathcart在苏格兰米德洛迪安格雷布利其结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1447年在英国苏格兰雷福福爾吉爾馬可爾姆享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy was born in 1387, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir James Wallace of Eldeslie, was 32 and his mother, Ellen Wallace of Elderslie, was 27. He married Elizabeth de Cathcart in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1447, in Kilmacolm, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy est né en 1387, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir James Wallace of Eldeslie, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ellen Wallace of Elderslie, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Cathcart à Gorebridge, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1447, à Kilmacolm, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy 1387 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Wallace of Eldeslie 32 und seine Mutter Ellen Wallace of Elderslie 27. Er hat in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland Elizabeth de Cathcart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1447 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Kilmacolm, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy è nato il nel 1387 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir James Wallace of Eldeslie, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Wallace of Elderslie, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Cathcart nel Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1447, nel Kilmacolm, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothyが1387年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir James Wallace of Eldeslieは32歳，母Ellen Wallace of Elderslieは27歳であった。スコットランドミドロスアンゴアブリッジでElizabeth de Cathcartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1447年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアキルマコルムで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy(이)가 1387년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Wallace of Eldeslie(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Wallace of Elderslie(은)는 27세였다. 그는 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 고레브리지에서 Elizabeth de Cathcart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1447년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 킬마콜름에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy nasceu em 1387, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir James Wallace of Eldeslie, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Wallace of Elderslie, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Cathcart em Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1447, em Kilmacolm, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy родился в 1387 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir James Wallace of Eldeslie было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Wallace of Elderslie, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Cathcart в местности горебридж, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1447 г. в местности килмаколм, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy nació en 1387, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir James Wallace of Eldeslie, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ellen Wallace of Elderslie, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Cathcart en Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1447, en Kilmacolm, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
